_comment: Editable 'This month in Kigali' editions. The homepage shows one, rotating by ISO week (editions[week % length]). Edit freely — add, reorder or remove editions; the weekly cron revalidates the homepage so changes go live. Keep events evergreen/recurring to avoid going stale.

editions.title: Coffee, hills & clear-sky mornings
editions.note: Kigali's dry-season light makes for crisp mornings and long golden evenings — perfect for a rooftop coffee before a day of meetings or exploring.

events.name: Car Free Day
events.where: Citywide — walk, run or cycle car-free streets

events.name: Weekend coffee crawl
events.where: Question Coffee, Inzora Rooftop & local roasters

editions.title: Arts, makers & live music
editions.note: Kigali's creative scene is buzzing right now — galleries, craft markets and open-air music make for easy, memorable evenings after work.

editions.title: Green city walks & viewpoints
editions.note: Between the rains the hills turn lush and green. It's a lovely stretch for walks, viewpoints and a slow weekend in the city.

events.name: Presidential Palace Museum
events.where: History a short drive from Kacyiru

editions.title: Food & flavour season
editions.note: From brochettes to brunch, Kigali's food scene is at its best. Book a table nearby or let us point you to a local favourite.

editions.title: Conference & business season
editions.note: It's a busy stretch for summits and conferences at the Convention Centre — a great time to be based minutes away in calm, connected Kacyiru.

editions.title: Gorillas & weekend getaways
editions.note: Using Kigali as a base? It's an ideal season for a weekend escape — the city is your calm, comfortable home between adventures.

events.name: Lake Kivu
events.where: Beaches & boat rides in the west
